name: Stupidella Horror
author: Poki
description: Stupidella Horror throws you into a creepy, twisted world filled with all kinds of terrifying creatures! Click around, solve bizarre puzzles, and find your way through each eerie scene. But beware—things are never as simple as they seem, and surprises lurk around every corner. Can you outsmart the horrors and escape? Dive in… if you dare! How to play Stupidella Horror? Click or tap to play! Who created Stupidella Horror? Stupidella Horror is created by Stupidella. Play their other games on Poki: Stupidella 1 , Stupidella 2 , Stupidella 3 , Stupidella 4 , Stupidella Click , Troll Toilet Quest 1 and Troll Toilet Quest 2 ! How can I play Stupidella Horror for free? You can play Stupidella Horror for free on Poki. Can I play Stupidella Horror on mobile devices and desktop? Stupidella Horror can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
